<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep changes surgical and honest. -->

## What & why
What does this change, and why?

## How verified
- [ ] `pytest -q` is green
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the behaviour change
- [ ] If this touches statistics, `tests/test_calibration.py` still passes
- [ ] If this adds a recommendation/condition/doctor rule, it cites `EVIDENCE.md`

## Notes
Anything reviewers should know (trade-offs, follow-ups).
